name: Astaroth
description: Freezing Astaroth is a supreme leader in Kisaragi. Daughter of the Kirasagi Conglomerate president, she founded Evil Organization Kisaragi alongside Belial the Great Flame and Lilith the Dark, receiving ice manipulation powers after being operated by the last one. Astaroth was begged by Six to join the organization whilst begging for incoherent things such as being the husband of hers. Astaroth is one of the three generals in the evil organization, the Kisaragi Corporation. She and her co-worker

name: Chakuro
description: Chakuro is a passionate and curious thinker who seems to always ask questions about the world around him. Some of the most occurring questions he asks are 'how do mud whales float?' and 'why are feelings important?' His obsession with writing is seen as an illness by his grandfather and himself. As an archivist, Chakuro writes objectively which is a contradiction to his expressive behavior. His writings are relied on by the council members. Chakuro is very expressively emotional. name: Chikage Koori
description: __Height:__ 159 cm __Grade:__ 3rd Year of Middle School A Hero of the first Hero team. Chikage is a shy, quiet and lonely girl who is not good at interacting with other people. She enjoys playing video games, like most introverts. Despite how mistrustful and silent towards others she seems, she is a good person at heart who only wishes for acceptance. name: Dalian
description: The Kuro Yomihime, or Black Biblioprincess. A young girl with long black hair tinted purple and large dark pink eyes, she is the custodian of the Bibliotheca Mystica de Dantalian housing 900,666 phantom books. Because of this, she generally considers herself of great importance and believes to be more knowledgeable than most humans, even going so far as to praise others in a presumptuous manner when they exhibit more wisdom than she anticipated. When asked a question that calls for a "Yes" or "N
mediaTitles: The Mystic Archives of Dantalian: Ibarahime

name: Free De La Hoya
description: Free was initially the leader of Spanish team BC Sol until he left and became a member of the American team, the Raging Bulls. He eventually returned to Spain and rejoined BC Sol as its leader. Currently, he is a member of the Big Five. His current Beyblade is Geist Fafnir 8'Proof Absorb. He was the world's Number 1 Blader until he had his first loss to Lui Shirosagi. However in Episode 47, he defeats Lui Shirosagi in the International Blader's Cup to regain his title. In Episode 50, he forfeits

name: Fudemushi
description: A member of a species called the brushbuddy. A small creature with fur resembling a paintbrush. It possesses a natural instinct to gather wherever it catches the scent of Magic Ink. Friendly and affectionate, it has grown quite attached to [Coco](https://anilist.co/character/129840/Coco) and the members of the Atelier.

name: Galatea
description: Claymore number three of the seventyeight generation, Galatea acts as the organization's eye because of her superb Youki sensing ability. Galatea can sense not only the size of the Youki of her targets, but also their emotions and actions, from a long distance. Her ability can also be used offensively, as she is able to control other Youki users by channeling the energy inside them to serve her own will. After the seven year timeskip it is revealed she hid in Rabona and cut her own eyes to avoid

name: Haruka Saigusa
description: __Height:__ 163 cm Haruka is a schoolmate of Riki's from a different class, but despite this, always seems to find time to hang around in Riki's classroom. She is a problem child and will start an uproar for her own personal enjoyment, which causes the public morals chairman Kanata Futaki, to often chase after her. ~!Kanata Futaki is actually her twin sister. Haruka was abused by her family (not her parents, who were kept away from her and Kanata), while Kanata was seemingly treated very well, t

name: Hikari Kohinata
description: __Height:__ 148 cm Student in Yumegaoka High School Year 1 Class 2 She lives with her grandma at the beach. She loves diving and Tonjiru (Miso pork soup). She wears a diver's safety whistle on her neck. Likes to give people nicknames. She was the one that decided on 'Dotty' and 'Cha'.
mediaTitles: Amanchu!: The Story of the Promised Summer and New Memories

name: Julian Mintz
description: Julian Mintz is the son of a soldier who served in the Alliance’s army, he lost his mother at a very young age and, some years later, his father was killed in battle leaving him a war-orphan. As such Julian was admitted in the wartime welfare program and, through the mediation of vice admiral Alex Cazellnu, he was made Yang Wenli’s ward. Julian is a very intelligent and responsible boy with a knack for house chores and is the one who takes care of the domestically incompetent Yang, s
mediaTitles: Legend of the Galactic Heroes: Die Neue These
Legend of the Galactic Heroes: Overture to a New War

Legend of the Galactic Heroes: Overture to a New War

name: Kei Amane
description: The cool gal in [Takuya's](https://anilist.co/character/322478/Takuya-Seo) class. One of the top beauties in her grade. Model figure with long, straight black hair. An only child. Has strong likes and dislikes, especially dislikes vegetables. Tall and skilled at basketball, but not part of any club activities. Despite her intelligent looks, she's not particularly good at studying. As for Kiramon, she insists she only likes it for her little sister-like friend Sayu and isn't an otaku... but...?
mediaTitles: Gals Can't Be Kind to Otaku!?
Gals Can’t Be Kind to Otaku!?

name: Koharu Seto
description: Daughter of Hiroko Seto, Koharu is generally a happy and cheerful child who adores her mother. Koharu has been shown to be quite shy and hesitant around others when she first meets them, but eventually warms up to them and begins to consider them as her family, as seen when she drew a picture of Nagi Aiza playing the piano with Kousei Arima.

name: Maho Akashi
description: **Position:** Vocals/DJ Maho is a member of **[Happy Around!](https://anilist.co/staff/263432)** Deeply moved by a DJ performance had seen in the past, Maho became immersed in DJ activities herself. Recently she has been trying track-mixing as well. She was persuaded by [Rinku](https://anilist.co/character/168296) to form a unit. Although she is sometimes bewildered by Rinku's eccentric actions, she continues to improve her performance as a DJ. (Source: D4DJ Fandom)

name: Misato Tachibana
description: A peach haired high school girl who generally acts as a tsukkomi towards Koujirou. Whenever he does anything to annoy her, she uses various guns and heavy weaponry that come out of nowhere on him, which he miraculously survives despite being injured.

name: Momoha Bonnouji
description: __Type:__ Loser __Occupation:__ Teacher __Debut:__ Chapter 108 **Girlfriend No. 021** She is the social studies teacher at Ohananomitsu High School and the advisor of its gardening club. Despite being a social studies teacher who teaches ethics, Momoha has many vices. She drinks alcohol on school grounds and even offers it to a student, spends money as soon as she earns it on booze, food, and gambling, asks one of her students for sex. Though aware of her vices, she's given up on trying to impro
mediaTitles: The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, Really Love You

name: Nanako Misonoo
description: Nanako is a sweet and generous 16-year-old girl, who just wants to "be loved by the others, even if only a bit", and doesn't mean to harm anyone. She is suddenly plunged into a world that may change her deeply, as she becomes a member of the Sorority, a prestigious school organisation that only the richest, most beautiful and sophisticated girls can access, the dream of all the youngest students. Nanako's admittance, decided by Lady Miya, will set in motion around the young character a real stor

name: Nei Ookawamura
description: __Species:__ Human __Height:__ 145 cm (4'9") __Peach Ability:__ Sure To Find, "Promise" __Occupation:__ Scout __Affiliation:__ Anti-Demon Corps (7th Unit)

name: Qiqi
description: __Vision:__ Cryo __Constellation:__ Pristina Nola An apprentice and herb gatherer at Bubu Pharmacy. "Blessed" by the adepti with a body that cannot die, this petite zombie cannot do anything without first giving herself orders to do it. Qiqi's memory is like a sieve. Out of necessity, she always carries around a notebook in which she writes anything important that she is sure to forget later. But on her worst days, she even forgets to look at her notebook. She was an unfortunate victim of circum

name: Razor
description: Razor is one of the Gamemasters and a creator of Greed Island. Razor was entrusted by Gon's father that he was not to hold back against his son should he ever comes to Greed Island. Razor is a tall and well built man by appearance and perhaps likes to play sports (especially ball games) as a pastime.Razor is a key person in getting one of the hardest designated card of the game. To get the card, the challengers must confront Razor and his 14 devils. It was learned that the 14 devils were not the

name: Shikaku Nara
description: __Height:__ 175.2 cm Nara Shikaku is the father of Shikamaru and the husband of Yoshino, and, like his son, he was part of an Ino-Shika-Cho trio, together with Choza Akimichi and Inoichi Yamanaka. Like his son, he is the Shika in the group name. As a member of the Nara clan, he raises deer, whose antlers can be used to make a medicine that halts the destructive effects of the Akimichi clan's three-colored pills. Since his son became a Chuunin, Shikaku has taken a great interest in Shikamaru's tr

name: So-Mang Han
description: __Height__: 158 cm (5'2") So-Mang is the female lead of Seasons of Blossom summer arc. She also appears in autumn and winter arc. She is [Ga-Eul](https://anilist.co/character/287198/GaEul-Jin)'s best friend.

name: Touma Hiragi
description: A third-year student at Furin High School in Class 1. One of the Four Kings of Bofurin, Hiragi is the leader of the Tamon Team. Hiragi is highly strung and possesses a strong sense of responsibility, often finding himself being pushed around by the overly gracious Umemiya. He's also a hard worker who can't let go of his stomach pain medicine. He possesses true martial arts ability, proven to be one of the best at his craft. He is an understanding person who loyally supports Umemiya. (Source: WIN
